results.rendered_html: abhilāṣaka, -lāṣi(si)n, -lāṣuka a. Wishing or desiring for (with acc., loc. or in comp.); desirous, covetous, greedy of; yadāryamasyāmabhilāṣi me manaḥ  Ś. 1. 22 ; jalābhilāṣī jalamādadānāṃ  R. 2. 6 ; 3. 36 ;  Me. 78 ; jayamatrabhavānnūnamarātiṣvabhilāṣukaḥ  Ki. 11. 18 ;  Śi. 15. 59.
